pr_text:
## Title: Fix buffer overflow in LTE turbo decoder causing scheduling constraint violations

### Summary
Fix a buffer overflow in the LTE turbo decoder scalar implementation that was causing resource block allocation violations in downstream scheduling logic. The `phy_threegpplte_turbo_decoder_scalar` function allocated arrays `ext` and `ext2` with size `n` (the coded block size in bits), but the `compute_ext_s` function accesses these arrays beyond their declared bounds during extrinsic informa
